title: Hexaware Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hexaware Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
